exploration_notes: In Envoy v1.31.2, v2 xDS API support has been fully removed. The relevant C++ source files implement: (1) **type_to_endpoint.cc** - maps resource type URLs to v3 service discovery methods (SotW/Delta/REST), with historical comments referencing the v2 service names like 'envoy.api.v2.RouteDiscoveryService'; (2) **utility.h/cc** - contains `checkTransportVersion` which explicitly rejects V2 transport API version with a deprecation error; (3) **subscription_factory_impl.cc** - the subscription fact
